Class representing assessment information for a person

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Score

Assessment record item score value

 decimal number

None.
AssessmentItemId

 integer

None.
IsOverwritten

Whether the assessment has been overwritten

 boolean

None.
IsAssessmentVisible

 boolean
